title: pilosella bauhini subsp. transgressa
intro: Pilosella bauhini subsp. transgressa, also known as False Oxeye Daisy, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of various skin conditions. Pilosella bauhini subsp. transgressa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses.
